reason: tests need rewrite: behavior_in_task_description and no_solution_leakage are irreconcilable. The tests assert exact literal strings (Rake::Task['rust:update'].reenable, Rake::Task['rust:update'].invoke, 'Repin cargo immediately after updating the version', regex pattern '_task, arguments\|') that are only found in the gold patch with no external discovery URL. The instruction cannot provide these literals without violating no_solution_leakage, and cannot omit them without violating behavior_in_task_description. solution_uniqueness_guard and tests_verify_behavior_not_text are also test problems (exact string matching, not behavior verification).
